tools.name: encode
tools.description: Encode or decode data between common formats. Formats: base64 (standard RFC 4648 with padding), base64url (URL-safe alphabet, no padding), hex (lowercase), url (percent-encoding, RFC 3986 unreserved chars pass through), html (HTML entity escaping — encode only). Pass direction='decode' to reverse (not supported for html). This is the Zig SDK proof plugin — compare its ~3 KB wasm to the ~3.5 MB Go equivalent.
tools.schema: {"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"string","description":"input string to encode or decode"},"format":{"type":"string","enum":["base64","base64url","hex","url","html"]},"direction":{"type":"string","enum":["encode","decode"],"description":"defaults to encode"}},"required":["data","format"]}
